prompt: Напиши CLI-утилиту, которая читает список URL и сохраняет CSV с HTTP-статусами, но тесты не должны ходить в сеть.
expected_steps: clarify timeout retry and no-live-network test policy
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define CSV contract for url and status
implement URL checker with injectable fetcher
write CSV status report with deterministic header
add fixture-based tests without live network
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: URL status checks use injectable fetcher
default tests require no live network
all tests run from generated project root
